sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The text clearly asks for the one incorrect set among A-D with respect to basic strength, and the expected answer is a single option label. The image is necessary because it contains the chemical sets, and those sets are mostly legible and interpretable despite some minor dark occlusion/noise on the right side.
